package main import ( "fmt" "net/smtp" ) // BuildFeedbackEmail generates an HTML-formatted email body for user feedback func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (emailBody string, err error) { if fromAddr == "" || toAddr == "" || userName == "" || subject == "" || feedbackContent == "" { return "", fmt.Errorf("all parameters must be provided") } // Create the HTML email body htmlContent := fmt.Sprintf(` User Feedback

User Feedback Received

From: %s
To: %s
Username: %s
Subject: %s
Feedback Content: 
%s

Please review this feedback and take appropriate action.

`, fromAddr, toAddr, userName, subject, feedbackContent) // Construct the full email message emailBody = fmt.Sprintf( "To: %s\r\n"+ "From: %s\r\n"+ "Subject: %s - User Feedback\r\n"+ "MIME-Version: 1.0\r\n"+ "Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8\r\n"+ "\r\n"+ "%s", toAddr, fromAddr, subject, htmlContent) return emailBody, nil } func main() { // Example usage of the BuildFeedbackEmail function fromAddress := "user@example.com" toAddress := "support@company.com" username := "John Doe" subject := "Website Issue" feedback := "I'm having trouble logging into my account. The page keeps showing an error." emailBody, err := BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddress, toAddress, username, subject, feedback) if err != nil { fmt.Printf("Error building email: %v\n", err) return } fmt.Println("Generated Email Body:") fmt.Println(emailBody) }

package main import ( "fmt" "net/smtp" "strings" ) // BuildFeedbackEmail generates an HTML-formatted email body for user feedback func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (emailBody string, err error) { if fromAddr == "" || toAddr == "" || userName == "" || subject == "" || feedbackContent == "" { return "", fmt.Errorf("all parameters must be provided") } // Create the email headers headers := make(map[string]string) headers["From"] = fromAddr headers["To"] = toAddr headers["Subject"] = subject headers["MIME-Version"] = "1.0" headers["Content-Type"] = "text/html; charset=utf-8" // Build the header string var headerStr strings.Builder for key, value := range headers { headerStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s: %s\r\n", key, value)) } headerStr.WriteString("\r\n") // End of headers // Create the HTML email body htmlBody := fmt.Sprintf(` User Feedback

User Feedback Received

Submitted by: %s

Subject: %s

Feedback Content:

%s


Please review this feedback and take appropriate action.

`, userName, subject, feedbackContent) // Combine headers and body emailBody = headerStr.String() + htmlBody return emailBody, nil } // Example usage func main() { from := "user@example.com" to := "support@company.com" userName := "John Doe" subject := "Issue with Product Login" feedback := "I'm having trouble logging into the application. The login button doesn't respond when clicked." email, err := BuildFeedbackEmail(from, to, userName, subject, feedback) if err != nil { fmt.Printf("Error building email: %v\n", err) return } fmt.Println("Generated Email:") fmt.Println(email) }
